_comment: THE WATCHER — the shadow-self, glimpsed (Rule 7: never named). relative+facingFrame so it plays at any orientation. The player double wears the PLAYER'S OWN skin (CutsceneManager patches it), so the figure the camera reveals is a motionless copy of you, left standing where you stood — the mirror-boss foreshadow. It is gone when the scene restores (the double despawns). Fires once, wired via flavor/watcher after the first badge. Tune framing with /cutscene record if the double's face needs centering.

cues.subtitle: §7...and when you look again, it is gone.
